title: UK Drills Blacksmith Metric Drill Bits, HSS Drill Bit Cut through Cast Iron, Brass, Steel, Copper and More - 17x150mm
features: HOT ROLLED, HIGH SPEED STEEL DRILL BIT - Superior to standard drill bits,it can withstand higher temperatures without losing its hardness
BLACKSMITH SHANK - This high performance drill bit can drill large holes while still being compatible with standard sizes of drill chucks on handheld electric drills
HOT ROLLED STEEL - This hot rolled drill bit is used when precise shapes and tolerances are required, perfect for professional plumbers, electricians, carpenters and DIY enthusiasts
TO BE USED WITH - When fixed to any electric drill machine, these drill bits can drill through tough loads. For professional plumbers, electricians and DIY enthusiasts
ABOUT US - We pride ourselves in providing the best quality drill bits for over 30+ years. From drilling wood & tiles to masonry, we're happy to be your professional choice!

We are a UK Drill bit specialist based in Wigan. Why should I choose UK Drills? With over 25 years trading & well over 50 million drill bits sold, we are THE drill bit supplier! Can I use your drill bits for DIY? Although our Drill Bits are great for professionals, they are also ideal for those looking to start a DIY project!
